Boxplot of a metric stratified by group with optional significance brackets

metric_boxplot.Rd

Boxplot of a metric stratified by group with optional significance brackets

Usage

metric_boxplot(
  data,
  metric,
  grouping_var,
  ylabel = "",
  xlabel = "",
  comparison = TRUE,
  test = "bonferroni",
  norm_test = TRUE,
  plot_colors,
  ...
)

Arguments

data

Data frame containing metric and grouping_var.

metric

Unquoted column name of the numeric variable to plot.

grouping_var

Unquoted column name of the grouping factor.

ylabel

Character; y-axis label. Defaults to "".

xlabel

Character; x-axis label. Defaults to "".

comparison

Logical; whether to add pairwise significance brackets. Defaults to TRUE.

test

Character; p-value correction method passed to the stat test (e.g. "bonferroni"). Defaults to "bonferroni".

norm_test

Logical; whether to run a Shapiro–Wilk normality test before selecting the statistical test. Defaults to TRUE.

plot_colors

Named character vector of colors, one per group level.

...

Currently unused.

Value

A ggplot object.

On this page
